name: Imagine.Art model execution matrix
description: Public-safe operational defaults for agents using this repo. Validate against the live Imagine.Art UI before launch because model options can change.

primary_use: default original stillframe generation when no reference control is required
known_risks: may not support the reference behavior needed for some continuity tasks
must be inspected before use as a Seedance source
avoid baked-in final typography for campaign text
preflight: confirm visible model label says ImagineArt 2.0
use first for original stillframes and plates when references are not required
if reference-controlled generation is needed and unsupported, switch that asset role to GPT Image 2

primary_use: director's-notes boards for complex Seedance 2 choreography
known_risks: workflow payloads may resolve to a different image model unless the visible UI model is checked
some ratios shown in the UI may still be rejected by backend validation
2:3 has been observed failing in workflow execution and should not be the first automated choice
preflight: confirm visible model label says GPT Image 2
confirm copied node JSON says modelId 41701, resolution 2K, and quality high
use 1:1 for storyboard or director's-notes boards unless a validated ratio is required
reject boards with unreadable labels, ambiguous arrows, fake ad text, or unclear phase order
download or inspect outputs for moderation placeholders before using them as references

known_risks: may need safer wording for product, body, or fashion imagery
preflight: confirm ratio matches final platform or reference role
inspect output before motion
do not use failed placeholder outputs as motion references

known_risks: still requires artifact review before motion
preflight: use when the campaign needs polished still anchors
avoid baked-in typography for final text

primary_use: 5-15 second campaign clips when supported by the live UI
known_risks: too many actions in one prompt causes chaotic motion
hands, reflections, glass, logos, and product rotation need simplified direction
one reference image should have one dominant job
pasted or UI-created video nodes may default to Kling 3.0 and must be corrected before launch
preflight: confirm visible model label says Seedance 2.0
confirm copied node JSON says modelId 21905
connect approved start/end/reference images
choose the longest useful live duration for the creative job, including 15s when available
keep phase count realistic for the selected duration
make beat timing broad rather than frame-exact unless proven
do not launch if the visible model label says Kling 3.0 unless the user explicitly requested Kling

known_risks: visual inputs must be translated into text direction
music may require regeneration to fit final edit length
preflight: specify instrumental/vocal choice
specify genre, mood, tempo, instrumentation, duration, and avoid list
map major edit hits to the intended campaign shot ladder

global_rules: the visible UI model and settings are authoritative before launch

default stillframe model priority is ImagineArt 2.0, then GPT Image 2 when references or continuity control are required, then Nano Banana 2, then Nano Banana Pro when the role specifically requires it
for high-realism commercial footage, use Seedance 2 / Seedance 2.0 as the core production layer unless explicitly overridden
Kling 3.0 is not the default campaign motion model
do not launch motion from unapproved stills
delete failed and unused nodes from the final workflow
document failed runs locally before cleanup
never call a proxy edit finished when required Imagine.Art motion is missing
